creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Ah! I found a trio of shots from 2012-02-19. Not the first incident, but this was when I first began recording information that might be useful: 

https://photos.app.goo.gl/BEGxUnNNqREmOuD03

In the third of the shots there's an inspector view of one of the buttons. 

My first sight of the problem was probably no longer than a week before the 19th. Before that, around two weeks might have passed without me using Google Photos. 

The notebook with outdated 56.0.* on Linux has a very flat battery at the moment. Waiting for it to get enough power to boot …
